full_text:
Xu Gan (Weichang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Gan, styledWeichang. One of the Seven Masters of the Jian’an period, noted for free poetic style. Xu Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Gan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
